Uses of Class
com.irurueta.navigation.inertial.calibration.magnetometer.RobustKnownHardIronMagneticFluxDensityNormMagnetometerCalibrator

  • Packages that use RobustKnownHardIronMagneticFluxDensityNormMagnetometerCalibrator 
    Package Description
    com.irurueta.navigation.inertial.calibration.magnetometer
    Contains classes for magnetometer calibration.

    • Uses of RobustKnownHardIronMagneticFluxDensityNormMagnetometerCalibrator in com.irurueta.navigation.inertial.calibration.magnetometer

      Subclasses of RobustKnownHardIronMagneticFluxDensityNormMagnetometerCalibrator in com.irurueta.navigation.inertial.calibration.magnetometer 
      Modifier and Type Class Description
      class  LMedSRobustKnownHardIronMagneticFluxDensityNormMagnetometerCalibrator
      Robustly estimates magnetometer cross couplings and scaling factors using LMedS algorithm.
      class  MSACRobustKnownHardIronMagneticFluxDensityNormMagnetometerCalibrator
      Robustly estimates magnetometer cross couplings and scaling factors using MSAC algorithm.
      class  PROMedSRobustKnownHardIronMagneticFluxDensityNormMagnetometerCalibrator
      Robustly estimates magnetometer cross couplings and scaling factors using PROMedS algorithm.
      class  PROSACRobustKnownHardIronMagneticFluxDensityNormMagnetometerCalibrator
      Robustly estimates magnetometer cross couplings and scaling factors using PROSAC algorithm.
      class  RANSACRobustKnownHardIronMagneticFluxDensityNormMagnetometerCalibrator
      Robustly estimates magnetometer cross couplings and scaling factors using RANSAC algorithm.
